task_completion.description: Verify that the agent viewed the 'My Portfolio' section to identify the current holdings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JStock 'Portfolio' tab or section open, displaying the currently held stocks.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new watchlist was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the watchlist management menu (e.g., clicking 'New' or 'Create' watchlist) in the JStock GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new watchlist is named 'Holdings'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The watchlist dropdown, tab, or title in the JStock GUI should clearly display the name 'Holdings'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required portfolio stocks are added to the 'Holdings' watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Holdings' watchlist must display the stock tickers AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA.

task_completion.description: Verify that no stocks outside the portfolio are included in the 'Holdings' watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Holdings' watchlist should contain exactly 3 stocks. Tickers like GOOGL and AMZN must NOT be visible in this specific watchlist.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the JStock graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interactions within the JStock application window (buttons, menus, tables) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use the terminal to bypass the GUI and create the CSV file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'echo', 'cat', 'mkdir', or 'cp' being used to create the 'Holdings' directory or 'realtimestock.csv' file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a text editor to manually write the watchlist data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open editing a CSV file with the stock tickers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target watchlist must be named exactly 'Holdings'. The required stocks that must be present in this watchlist are AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA (exactly 3 stocks). The stocks GOOGL and AMZN are forbidden and must NOT be included in the 'Holdings' watchlist.
